panels.title: Active Mode
panels.description: Mode of the currently-running CGF or autonomous session, from harness_run_config_info{mode}. Shows '—' when no instrumented run is active. INTERACTIVE mode currently does not emit harness_run_config_info — see OBSERVABILITY.md § 3.4; D5 covers interactive-mode panels directly.

panels.title: Run Config
panels.description: Active run's config dimensions from harness_run_config_info.

panels.title: Spend (range)
panels.description: Total cost across the dashboard time window.

panels.title: Cache Hit Rate
panels.description: Headline cache health — see D2 for full breakdown. Healthy sessions sit at ≥90%; <60% means cache is busted each turn.

panels.title: Edit Accept Rate
panels.description: accept / (accept + reject) for code-edit tools. See D3 for breakdown.

panels.title: Tokens (range)
panels.description: All-type tokens consumed across the dashboard window.

panels.title: Error Rate
panels.description: harness_agent_requests_total{status="error"} rate over total. Prometheus-only proxy for SDK API reliability — see D4.

panels.title: Spend by Model
panels.description: Per-model spend rate. Inspect for mid-session model switches.

panels.title: Optimize mode — Phase progression + iteration (deep-link to D7). Populated only when an optimize run is active.
Phase Progression (multi-resource pipeline)
panels.description: Compact view of the multi-resource pipeline phases in chronological order. State-timeline row order = refId order (A→J), per the gotcha documented in config/monitoring/CLAUDE.md. For single-resource path (research → optimize → finalize), see D7's dedicated panel.

panels.title: Iteration
panels.description: Current iteration. See D7 for full pipeline.

panels.title: Interactive mode — prompts + tool calls + cost (deep-link to D5). Populated only when an interactive session is active.
Autonomous mode — task progress + commits (deep-link to D6). Populated only when an autonomous run is active.
Commits (range)
panels.description: See OBSERVABILITY.md § 6 item 7 — typically empty for CGF workloads.

panels.title: Workspace Files (Python)
panels.description: harness_workspace_files_total — count of .py files in workspace.

panels.title: Checkpoint Size
panels.description: harness_checkpoint_size_bytes — total bytes of checkpoint files.

panels.title: Spend (last 24h)
panels.description: Rolling 24-hour cost. Click to open the Cost & Spend dashboard for the full breakdown.

panels.title: Tokens In (last 24h)
panels.description: Sum of input + cache-read + cache-creation tokens over the rolling 24h window.

panels.title: Tokens Out (last 24h)
panels.description: Output tokens over the rolling 24h window.
